finding_results.notes: Narcissa's reveal broken out of thesis-speech across five passages. (1) Mechanism exposition compressed from a full catalogue to three verbs: 'amplifies, gates, encourages.' (2) Greenhouse analogy replaced with a shorter, costlier formulation: 'It can make a thing louder. It cannot put it there.' — no ready-made universal metaphor. (3) 'I am telling you' thesis-delivery replaced with oblique, halting speech: 'the resonance, the examinations, whatever followed' — Narcissa names the clinical parts and lets 'whatever followed' carry the wanting through implication, consistent with her high-indirectness profile. Visible effort (gaze to dead grate) replaces polished delivery. (4) Universal abstraction about 'any relationship' and verbatim 'the house makes the question visible' both removed; replaced with personal admission: 'I have lived with that question myself, Draco. There is no bottom to it.' — understanding lands through Narcissa's private cost rather than philosophical doctrine, and sets up the Lucius revelation that follows. (5) 'The seed was there' / 'do not mistake volume for invention' replaced with 'It was already there' — greenhouse-metaphor orphan removed, aphorism cut. Draco's concrete memory paragraph (line 81) already provides the beat of understanding through remembered detail (her hands, midnight, the kiss) rather than clean explanatory speech.

Draco's reply changed from 'Yes.' to 'You should have.' — terse, uncontracted (consistent with his moderate contraction level and stress-driven formality), carries judgment without absolution. Not a verbatim style-bible example line. Full scan confirmed no example lines from any character profile appear verbatim in the revised chapter.

summary: Two dialogue findings addressed. Narcissa's reveal restructured from polished thesis-speech into costlier, family-specific delivery: greenhouse analogy removed, universal abstraction replaced with personal admission, oblique naming replaces explicit cataloguing of the wanting. Understanding now lands through concrete remembered detail and Narcissa's visible effort rather than through clean explanatory speech. Draco's doorstep acknowledgment revised from generic to character-specific formality-under-stress. No style-bible example lines remain in the chapter. All payoff obligations preserved: Narcissa's full-knowledge reveal, the drawing room entry, and the first-name transition remain intact and unaltered.
